work.description: Where passion for cow protection meets traditional craftsmanship. We're dedicated community to preserving the sacred human-cow bond through our products. Our journey begins with high hygiene standards, crafting wholesome sweets and delicacies. We believe in coordination, love, and support. Our mission is to share our values through premium products distributed globally. Each item represents our commitment to purity and sustainability. Explore our range and join us in celebrating cow protection while savoring our lovingly prepared treats. Together, let's make a difference with every bite, promoting a timeless tradition and delicious flavors.
work.title: Sree Nandas

work.description: SMS Automation refers to the technology and practice of using software, application programming interfaces (APIs), and pre-set rules or artificial intelligence (AI) to send text messages automatically to users without manual human intervention.
work.title: SMS Automation
SmartDoc: OCR Automation
work.description: A smart OCR automation project that automates the extraction and conversion of PDF content into editable .docx formats. This solution focuses on high-precision text recognition and seamless file handling, providing a streamlined user experience for digitizing large-scale document repositories.

work.title: AI-Powered Social Media Content Automation
work.description: Built a fully autonomous content engine that scrapes trending topics and industry news daily, generates platform-optimised posts using AI, and automatically publishes them across LinkedIn, Instagram, and other social channels — keeping the brand active and relevant without any manual effort from the client's team.

work.title: WhatsApp Automation for Kredoo CRM
work.description: Engineered a WhatsApp Business automation system natively connected to the Kredoo CRM platform, enabling automated lead nurturing, lead follow-ups, and real-time conversation over WhatsApp — with all conversation threads synced back to CRM records for complete visibility and context.

work.title: GenZ IQ Learning – Smart Learning Management System
work.description:
GenZ IQ Learning is a smart LMS that provides students with
courses, assignments, mock tests, and classes, while enabling
colleges to track and analyze student performance effectively. It
fosters an interactive and data-driven learning experience for both
students and institutions.

work.title: Mamma Magic
work.description: E-commerce mobile application designed for a small business enabling product browsing, purchasing, and order tracking with a seamless user experience.

work.title: Chaitan yamrutha-Community Empowerment Platform
work.description: A website promoting a lifestyle of simplicity and mindful growth through initiatives like organic farming, animal welfare, education, healthcare, and food for life, built to inspire and serve communities worldwide.

work.title: Knowva
work.description: This is a full-stack web application called KNOWva, built as a React + TypeScript frontend with Vite and a PHP/MySQL backend API. The frontend uses modern UI tooling like Tailwind CSS, shadcn-ui components, React Router, React Query, and animations from Framer Motion and GSAP. It includes pages for browsing AI tools, categories, tool details, comparisons, newsletter, consulting, providers, community forum threads, login/signup, profile management, and an admin dashboard.

work.title: Intelligent SMS Lead Engagement via HubSpot
work.description: Developed a smart SMS automation system integrated with HubSpot CRM that instantly messages new leads the moment they enter the pipeline, handles their follow-up questions with AI-powered responses, and sends timely follow-up messages to keep leads engaged — turning cold entries into warm conversations automatically.

work.title: Certification Issuance Automation
work.description: Developed an automated certification generation and distribution system that triggers upon course completion or milestone achievement. The workflow auto-populates personalised certificate templates, converts them to branded PDFs, and delivers them to recipients via email — cutting certificate turnaround from days to seconds.

work.title: Email-to-Email Workflow via Monday.com
work.description: Implemented an intelligent email-to-email automation integrated with Monday.com boards. Incoming emails are parsed, categorised, and routed as Monday.com items, which then trigger outbound response emails based on board status changes, assignee updates, or custom rules. The system also automatically sends scheduled follow-up emails to leads based on their pipeline stage — ensuring no lead goes cold — all without any manual forwarding or intervention.

work.title: AI-Powered Lead Coordinator
work.description: AI-powered lead coordinator that automates the entire process of handling and managing inquiries from potential tenants. It pre-qualifies leads by analyzing their needs.

work.title: Content Generation Platform
work.description: AI-powered content creation tool for social media, blogs, and marketing materials

Benriii is a mobile-first digital advertising and discovery platform where users earn real rewards by engaging with short, high-quality ads. The app delivers a seamless, reel-style experience that connects viewers with brands, events, stores, and offers they care about. Advertisers gain powerful visibility and real-time insights, while users get rewarded for their attention. Benriii transforms advertising into a fun, interactive, and value-driven experience for everyone
